info.title: DataForSEO API
info.description: DataForSEO API endpoints exposed through the AIsa unified gateway.

post.description: Setting Google Organic SERP Tasks. Standard task-based endpoint. Your account is charged only for setting a task. You can send up to 100 tasks per POST call.

version.description: API version

x-doc.desc_en: API version string that produced this response.
x-doc.title_zh: 生成本响应的 API 版本号。

x-doc.desc_en: Overall response status code; check it before reading the payload.
x-doc.title_zh: 本次响应的总体状态码；读取数据前应先检查。

x-doc.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying the overall status code.
x-doc.title_zh: 与总体状态码对应的可读说明文字。

x-doc.desc_en: Server-side execution time of the request, in seconds.
x-doc.title_zh: 本次请求的服务端执行耗时，单位秒。

x-doc.desc_en: Total billed cost of this response across all tasks, in USD.
x-doc.title_zh: 本响应所有任务的合计计费金额，单位美元。

tasks_count.description: Number of tasks in the request

x-doc.desc_en: Number of task entries contained in the `tasks` array.
x-doc.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中包含的任务条目数量。

tasks_error.description: Number of tasks returned with an error

x-doc.desc_en: How many tasks finished with an error; if non-zero, inspect each task's own status fields.
x-doc.title_zh: 以错误结束的任务数量；若不为 0，需逐个检查任务自身的状态字段。

x-doc.desc_en: List of task objects; one entry per task in the request.
x-doc.title_zh: 任务对象列表，请求中的每个任务对应一个条目。

x-doc.desc_en: UUID of this task; reuse it to fetch the task's results from the matching task_get endpoint.
x-doc.title_zh: 该任务的 UUID；在对应 task_get 端点取该任务结果时复用。

x-doc.desc_en: Per-task status code; check it to tell whether this individual task succeeded.
x-doc.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码，用于判断该任务是否成功。

x-doc.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's status code.
x-doc.title_zh: 该任务状态码对应的可读说明文字。

x-doc.desc_en: Billed cost attributed to this task, in USD.
x-doc.title_zh: 归属于该任务的计费金额，单位美元。

x-doc.desc_en: Number of entries in this task's `result` array.
x-doc.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的条目数量。

x-doc.desc_en: Search term to query. URL-encode it; the SERP is built around this query.
x-doc.title_zh: 要查询的搜索词。需做 URL 编码；SERP 围绕该查询词构建。

location_name.description: Full name of search engine location

x-doc.desc_en: Full text name of the search-engine location (e.g. `London,England,United Kingdom`); used to localize the SERP.
x-doc.title_zh: 搜索引擎地区的完整名称（如 `London,England,United Kingdom`），用于本地化 SERP。

x-doc.desc_en: Numeric code of the search-engine location; the code-based alternative to `location_name`, obtainable from the locations reference endpoint.
x-doc.title_zh: 搜索引擎地区的数字代码，是 `location_name` 的代码型替代写法，可从地区参考端点获取。

x-doc.desc_en: GPS coordinates of the target location, as `latitude,longitude`; used for fine-grained geo-targeting.
x-doc.title_zh: 目标地点的 GPS 坐标，格式为 `纬度,经度`，用于更精细的地理定向。

language_name.description: Full name of search engine language

x-doc.desc_en: Full text name of the search-engine language (e.g. `English`); the SERP is returned in this language.
x-doc.title_zh: 搜索引擎语言的完整名称（如 `English`），SERP 以该语言返回。

x-doc.desc_en: Two-letter language code (e.g. `en`); the code-based alternative to `language_name`.
x-doc.title_zh: 两位语言代码（如 `en`），是 `language_name` 的代码型替代写法。

x-doc.desc_en: Number of SERP results to parse; deeper values cost more crawl pages and increase task price.
x-doc.title_zh: 要解析的 SERP 结果数量；取值越深消耗的抓取页数越多，任务价格也越高。

x-doc.desc_en: Upper bound on the number of SERP pages to crawl for this task.
x-doc.title_zh: 本任务抓取的 SERP 页面数上限。

x-doc.desc_en: Device profile to emulate for the search, such as `desktop` or `mobile`; affects layout and result set.
x-doc.title_zh: 搜索时模拟的设备类型，如 `desktop` 或 `mobile`，会影响版式与结果集合。

x-doc.desc_en: Operating system to emulate for the chosen device, refining the user-agent presented to Google.
x-doc.title_zh: 为所选设备模拟的操作系统，用于细化向 Google 呈现的 user-agent。

group_organic_results.description: Display related results as grouped organic results

x-doc.desc_en: When enabled, related organic results are merged and reported as grouped organic entries instead of separate items.
x-doc.title_zh: 启用后，相关的自然结果会被合并归组为分组自然条目，而非分散的独立条目。

calculate_rectangles.description: Calculate pixel rankings for SERP elements in advanced results

x-doc.desc_en: When enabled, pixel-coordinate rankings (rectangles) are computed for elements in the advanced SERP, useful for visual position analysis.
x-doc.title_zh: 启用后，会为高级 SERP 中的元素计算像素坐标排名（矩形框），便于做可视化位置分析。

postback_url.description: Postback URL for completed task results

x-doc.desc_en: Your endpoint that DataForSEO calls with the completed task results once the task finishes.
x-doc.title_zh: 任务完成后 DataForSEO 回调推送结果的你方接收端点。

pingback_url.description: Pingback URL for task completion notification

x-doc.desc_en: Your endpoint that DataForSEO pings to notify you that the task is complete, without sending the payload.
x-doc.title_zh: 任务完成时 DataForSEO 通知你方的 ping 端点，仅通知不发送结果数据。

x-doc.desc_en: Result format delivered to `postback_url`; choose the variant (such as advanced or html) matching how you want results pushed.
x-doc.title_zh: 推送到 `postback_url` 的结果格式；按你期望的推送方式选择对应变体（如 advanced 或 html）。

x-doc.desc_en: Your own identifier echoed back with the task, useful for correlating results with your records.
x-doc.title_zh: 随任务回显的你方自定义标识，便于将结果与你方记录关联。

x-doc.heading_zh: 提交 Google 自然搜索 SERP 任务 post_dataforseo_serp_google_organic_task_post
x-doc.desc_en: Queue a Google Organic SERP task for a keyword/location/language; you are charged only for posting, and up to 100 tasks can be sent per call. The response returns a task id used to collect the SERP later via the matching task_get endpoint or via postback/pingback.
x-doc.description_zh: 为给定 keyword/地区/语言提交一个 Google 自然搜索（Organic）SERP 任务；仅按提交计费，单次调用最多 100 个任务。响应返回 task id，稍后通过对应的 task_get 端点或 postback/pingback 收取 SERP。

get.summary: Get Google Organic HTML Results by id
get.description: Get Google Organic HTML Results by id. Retrieve raw HTML results for a posted task within 30 days at no extra charge.

x-doc.desc_en: UUID of the task whose results you want to fetch, as returned in `tasks[].id` when the task was posted.
x-doc.title_zh: 要取结果的任务 UUID，即提交任务时 `tasks[].id` 返回的值。

x-doc.desc_en: API version string that produced this response.
x-doc.title_zh: 生成本响应的 API 版本号。

x-doc.desc_en: UUID of this task; reuse it to fetch the task's results from the matching task_get endpoint.
x-doc.title_zh: 该任务的 UUID；在对应 task_get 端点取该任务结果时复用。

x-doc.desc_en: Result payload for this task; the actual SERP data is nested inside.
x-doc.title_zh: 该任务的结果载荷，实际的 SERP 数据嵌套于内。

x-doc.desc_en: Array of SERP elements parsed for this result.
x-doc.title_zh: 本结果解析出的 SERP 元素数组。

x-doc.desc_en: Raw HTML content of this element.
x-doc.title_zh: 该元素的原始 HTML 内容。

x-doc.heading_zh: 按 id 获取 Google 自然搜索 HTML 结果 get_dataforseo_serp_google_organic_task_get_html_id
x-doc.desc_en: Retrieve the raw HTML of a previously posted Google Organic SERP task by its id; available within 30 days of posting at no extra charge.
x-doc.description_zh: 按 task id 取回此前提交的 Google 自然搜索 SERP 任务的原始 HTML；提交后 30 天内可免费获取。

post.description: Live Google Organic SERP Regular. Returns regular SERP results immediately. Each Live SERP API call can contain only one task.

post.summary: Setting Google AI Mode SERP Tasks
post.description: Google AI Mode SERP API provides search results from the AI Mode feature of Google Search. Send JSON task arrays; up to 100 tasks per POST call. Completed tasks can be retrieved later by id, postback_url, or pingback_url.
